channel.title: Go on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Go on Mike Ball

item.title: Unit Testing AWS S3 Downloads in Go
item.description: How can a function wrapping the aws-sdk-go be unit tested using a local directory serving as a mock AWS S3 bucket?

item.title: Extending the gh CLI with Go
item.description: Some introductory tips on building gh CLI extensions in Go.

item.title: Channels in Go
item.description: A brief intro to Go concurrency through channels and goroutines.
